---
title: "test_Rmd_render"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-02-27"
---

Let's see if we can make this draw.
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
devtools::load_all()  # TODO: Use actual package
library(OpenMx)
demo("OneFactorModel_PathRaw", ask=FALSE)
s <- as.GraphModel(oneFactorFit)
```

It'll go in the plot here:
```{r, demoPlot}
plot(s)
```
